references.title: Towards Explainable Group Formation by Knowledge Map based Genetic Algorithm

annotations.text: The black-box nature of ML is still a barrier to acceptance of its use in educational practices. The authors propose a method of group formation that uses course knowledge structures, reading behvaiour and assessment analysis for group formation. Optimization for both homogeneity and heterogeneity is attempted.  Case study on high-school data show that the decisions of the algorithm are explainable, which helps garner trust for these models.
